org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard

Class StandardAnchor<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractModelObject
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractAnchor<G,N,A,E>
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard.StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph.
    N - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    A - is the type of the anchors inside the graph.
    E - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ModelObject>, Anchor<G,N,A,E>, ModelObject, PropertyNames
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FSMAnchor

    public class StandardAnchor<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
extends AbstractAnchor<G,N,A,E>
    Define an anchor with the standard implementation.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addEdge(E edge)
      Attached an Edge to this Anchor.
      (package private) void addEdge(E edge, boolean testConnection)
      Add the specified edge inside the list of the binded edges to this anchor.
      ModelObjectEvent fireComponentAdded(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the addition of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireComponentRemoved(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireContainerChanged(ModelObject oldContainer, ModelObject newContainer)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent fireLinkChanged(ModelObject oldLinkedObject, ModelObject newLinkedObject)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent firePropertyChanged(String propertyName, Object oldValue, Object newValue)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a property of this model object.
      List<E> getEdges()
      Reply all Edges attached to this Node by the way of Anchors.
      AnchorLocation getPreferredLocation()
      Replies the preferred location for this anchor.
      (package private) boolean isForwardEventsToNode()
      Replies if this anchor is forwarding the events to its node.
      void removeAllEdges()
      Removes all Edges attached to this Anchor.
      void removeEdge(E edge)
      Remove an Edge attached to this Anchor.
      (package private) void setForwardEventsToNode(boolean forward)
      Set if this anchor is forwarding the events to its node.

    • Constructor Detail

      • StandardAnchor

        public StandardAnchor()

    • Method Detail

      • isForwardEventsToNode

        boolean isForwardEventsToNode()
        Replies if this anchor is forwarding the events to its node.
        Returns:
        if the events are forwarded; otherwise false.

      • setForwardEventsToNode

        void setForwardEventsToNode(boolean forward)
        Set if this anchor is forwarding the events to its node.
        Parameters:
        forward - is true if the events are forwarded; otherwise false.

      • getPreferredLocation

        public AnchorLocation getPreferredLocation()
        Replies the preferred location for this anchor. The subclasses may override this function. By default it replies, AnchorLocation.CENTER.
        Returns:
        the preferred position of this anchor.

      • fireContainerChanged

        public ModelObjectEvent fireContainerChanged(ModelObject oldContainer,
                                    ModelObject newContainer)
        Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.
        Specified by:
        fireContainerChanged in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:
        fireContainerChanged in class AbstractModelObject
        Parameters:
        oldContainer - is the old container.
        newContainer - is the new container.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireLinkChanged

        public ModelObjectEvent fireLinkChanged(ModelObject oldLinkedObject,
                               ModelObject newLinkedObject)
        Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.
        Specified by:
        fireLinkChanged in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:
        fireLinkChanged in class AbstractModelObject
        Parameters:
        oldLinkedObject - is the old linked object.
        newLinkedObject - is the new linked object.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • firePropertyChanged

        public ModelObjectEvent firePropertyChanged(String propertyName,
                                   Object oldValue,
                                   Object newValue)
        Notifies the listener about the change of a property of this model object.
        Specified by:
        firePropertyChanged in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:
        firePropertyChanged in class AbstractModelObject
        Parameters:
        propertyName - is the name of the property.
        oldValue - is the old value of the property.
        newValue - is the new value of the property.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireComponentAdded

        public ModelObjectEvent fireComponentAdded(ModelObject component)
        Notifies the listener about the addition of a component in this model object.
        Specified by:
        fireComponentAdded in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:
        fireComponentAdded in class AbstractModelObject
        Parameters:
        component - is the added component.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • fireComponentRemoved

        public ModelObjectEvent fireComponentRemoved(ModelObject component)
        Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.
        Specified by:
        fireComponentRemoved in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:

        Parameters:

        Returns:

      • fireContentChanged

        public ModelObjectEvent fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
        Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
        Specified by:
        fireContentChanged in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:
        fireContentChanged in class AbstractModelObject
        Parameters:
        cause - is the cause of the event. If null the cause of the event is not another event.
        Returns:
        the fired event.

      • getEdges

        public List<E> getEdges()
        Reply all Edges attached to this Node by the way of Anchors.
        Returns:
        a set of Edges.

      • addEdge

        public void addEdge(E edge)
        Attached an Edge to this Anchor.
        Parameters:
        edge - a new Edges.

      • addEdge

        void addEdge(E edge,
           boolean testConnection)
        Add the specified edge inside the list of the binded edges to this anchor. This function is able to test or ignore the connection constrains applied by AbstractAnchor.canConnectAsEndAnchor(org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.Edge, org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.Anchor) and AbstractAnchor.canConnectAsStartAnchor(org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.Edge, org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.Anchor).
        Parameters:
        edge - is the edge to insert.
        testConnection - indicates if the connection constraints should be checked.

      • removeEdge

        public void removeEdge(E edge)
        Remove an Edge attached to this Anchor.
        Parameters:
        edge - the Edges to remove.

      • removeAllEdges

        public void removeAllEdges()
        Removes all Edges attached to this Anchor.
